---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for MiniDock
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Home users
- [ ] Power users / homelabbers
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

**How would you use this feature?**
Describe a typical workflow or scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Implementation Ideas

**Technical approach (if you have ideas):**
- Describe any technical implementation ideas you have
- Mention any relevant libraries, APIs, or technologies

**UI/UX considerations:**
- How should this feature be presented in the UI?
- Any mockups or wireframes? (attach images if available)

**Integration points:**
- Which existing features would this interact with?
- Any potential conflicts or dependencies?

## Priority and Impact

**How important is this feature to you?**
- [ ] Critical - blocking my workflow
- [ ] High - would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor improvement

**Estimated impact:**
- [ ] Affects core functionality
- [ ] Affects specific module (Docker/VM/Automation/etc.)
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Developer experience

## Additional Context

**Related features in other tools:**
- Mention similar features in other NAS/server management tools
- Include links or screenshots if helpful

**Workarounds you're currently using:**
- Describe any manual workarounds you're using now

**Additional context:**
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

---

**Checklist before submitting:**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered how this fits with MiniDock's design philosophy
- [ ] I am willing to contribute to the implementation (optional)
